sections.headline: Build market judgment — not product memory.

sections.title: The story behind the programme
sections.content:
Axis Mutual Fund was launched in 2009, in the aftermath of the global financial crisis — a time when the investment world was being rebuilt.

Over the last decade and a half, markets, investors and products have evolved dramatically.

• The Indian economy moved through multiple growth cycles
• Investor participation expanded across cities and channels
• Mutual fund products evolved from basic equity funds to sophisticated strategies including hybrid, index and thematic funds
• Technology and regulation reshaped how investors access markets

Axis Mutual Fund itself evolved during this journey — starting with its first equity strategy in 2009 and gradually expanding across equity, debt, hybrid and passive funds while building a disciplined investment framework.

Understanding this evolution is critical for anyone representing the Axis platform.

sections.note: Axis AUM is a placeholder in v1; connect to internal AUM series later.

sections.title: What this programme does
sections.content:
This programme is designed to build market judgment.

Each episode explores an important phase in the evolution of:

• Markets
• Investor behaviour
• Mutual fund products
• Axis investment philosophy

Through context, real data, and scenario-based assessments, the programme helps you connect events → markets → investment decisions → product outcomes.

sections.title: How it works
sections.content:
Each episode contains:

Context
Key market events, data and investment insights.

Assessment
Scenario-based questions testing your judgment.

Explanation
Detailed reasoning behind every answer.

Results
Your performance band and learning insights.

sections.title: The objective
sections.content:
Not to memorise facts.

But to develop the ability to answer the most important question investors ask:

“Why is this happening in the market — and what should we do about it?”
